# ManoMitra

> ManoMitra ("friend of the mind") is a Generative-AI-powered mental wellness web app for Indian students preparing for high-pressure competitive exams (NEET, JEE, CUET, CAT, GATE, UPSC, Board Exams). It offers daily mood/stress check-ins, an AI "Mind Report", an instant "Calm Me Now" panel, a wellness dashboard, and a caring AI companion chat — all rooted in Indian-style wellness (yoga, pranayama, meditation, spiritual reflection, family connection, study balance).

ManoMitra is a wellness and reflection companion for educational purposes only. It is NOT a replacement for professional mental health support, medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

## Pages

- [Home](https://manomitra.pages.dev/): Calm landing page with a daily check-in and Calm Me Now entry points.
- [About](https://manomitra.pages.dev/about): What ManoMitra is, why it exists, what it offers, and its privacy approach.
- [Daily Check-in](https://manomitra.pages.dev/checkin): Log mood, stress, energy, sleep, study hours, trigger, and a private journal; generates an AI Mind Report.
- [Calm Me Now](https://manomitra.pages.dev/calm): Instant 2-minute calm plans with guided breathing for panic, overthinking, anger, focus loss, burnout, and sleeplessness.
- [Dashboard](https://manomitra.pages.dev/dashboard): Charts of mood, stress, and sleep trends over time.
- [Talk to ManoMitra](https://manomitra.pages.dev/chat): AI companion chat with a warm, non-diagnostic, elder-sibling tone.
- [Terms & Safety](https://manomitra.pages.dev/terms): Medical, physical-practice, and mental-health disclaimers plus India crisis helplines.

## Key facts

- Audience: Indian students, ages ~15–25, preparing for competitive/board exams.
- Tech: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS, deployed on Cloudflare Pages. No backend — all user data is stored locally in the browser (localStorage). No accounts.
- AI: Uses the OpenAI API when a key is configured, with an automatic rule-based fallback so the app always works offline/keyless.
- Privacy: Check-ins and journals never leave the user's device.

## Safety

- Not medical, psychological, or therapeutic advice.
- Wellness suggestions (yoga, pranayama, meditation) are gentle and beginner-oriented; users are urged to stop if they feel unwell and to consult a doctor if pregnant or with relevant conditions.
- India crisis helplines: iCall 9152987821 · Vandrevala Foundation 1800-2333-330 (24/7) · NIMHANS 080-46110007.
